name: fastapi-service
description: A modern async Python API service built with FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2 (async), Alembic for migrations, and Pydantic v2 for data validation. Designed for teams building high-performance REST microservices with full type safety and automated OpenAPI docs.
unified_instruction:
# FastAPI Service

## Stack
- **Framework**: FastAPI
- **ORM**: SQLAlchemy 2 (async)
- **Migrations**: Alembic
- **Validation**: Pydantic v2
- **Auth**: JWT (python-jose) or OAuth2
- **Testing**: pytest + httpx AsyncClient
- **Language**: Python 3.12+

## Project Structure
```
app/
  routers/         # Route handlers (thin — delegate to services)
  services/        # Business logic
  models/          # SQLAlchemy ORM models
  schemas/         # Pydantic request/response schemas
  dependencies.py  # Shared DI providers (db session, current user)
  main.py          # App factory and lifespan
alembic/
  versions/        # Migration files
tests/
  conftest.py      # pytest fixtures
```

## Conventions
- All endpoints are async — never mix sync I/O into async routes
- Request and response shapes are fully typed Pydantic models
- Business logic lives in service classes, not routers
- DB session injected via `Depends` — never imported directly in routers
- Errors use typed exception handlers; never leak internal tracebacks

## Key Commands
```bash
uvicorn app.main:app --reload     # Start dev server
alembic upgrade head               # Apply migrations
alembic revision --autogenerate   # Generate new migration
pytest                            # Run test suite
```
